description: M2.9.0 cross-language fixture for the Loom env digest (F1). The digest is sha256(canonical_payload(env)). canonical_payload == json.dumps(env, sort_keys=True, separators=(',', ':')) (ensure_ascii=True) == fabric_protocol::canonicalize. Each case carries the exact canonical UTF-8 bytes as `expected_canonical`; the Python and Rust tests hash those bytes themselves and assert the digest function reproduces them, so no precomputed sha256 constant is needed. The newline/tab/unicode cases are the exact regressions the hand-rolled Rust escaper shipped in M2.9.1.
